narrative:
Monroe Twp township has 865 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.3 percentage points.
